name: Asian Foil-Wrapped Chicken
recipeInstructions:
This is an appetizer recipe-serves about 4
Cut chicken meat into 24 thin slices. Have ready 8 6-inch sheets of aluminum foil.
1. Mix the chicken meat with all ingredients except for the green onions.
2. Place 3 slices of chicken on each sheet of foil.
3. Fold the remaining sides to form sealed triangular packets.
4. Heat oil in a wok. Deep fry the foil-wrapped packets over high heat for about 5 minutes until crispy and cooked through.
5. Remove from the oil and drain on serving plates.
6. Sprinkle chopped green onions on top before serving.
